scripts.image:check: bun run runner:stage && wrangler deploy --dry-run && docker run --rm --entrypoint sh meanwhile-cloudflare-sandbox-bridge-sandbox:worker -c 'test -r /opt/meanwhile/licenses/LICENSE && test -r /opt/meanwhile/licenses/THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES'
scripts.runner:stage: rm -rf .runner && mkdir -p .runner && bun build ../../runner/main.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64-baseline --minify --outfile .runner/meanwhile-runner && bun build ../../test/fixtures/acp-agent.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64-baseline --minify --outfile .runner/meanwhile-demo-agent && cp ../../LICENSE ../../THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES .runner/
